steps.title: Identify the key parallel structure
steps.content: The passage pairs ______ steps with illuminate the Pleistocene epoch using “not only...but also.” This structure tells us the blank verb should work similarly to “illuminate”—to make something clear or visible. We need a word that describes how fossil remains help scientists perceive or identify the evolutionary steps.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Discern means to perceive or identify something clearly—exactly what fossil remains help scientists do when understanding the evolutionary steps. The other three choices either fail to convey the meaning of identifying or understanding steps, or don't work grammatically with “steps.” That matches choice D — D is correct.
